title: Vežba 57

questions.text: Izaberite rečenicu koja koristi this i that tačno.

answers.answer: This mouse here works well, but that one over there doesn't.
That is my phone on this table, but this is my charger in that room.
answers.feedback: Struktura rečenice je teška za razumevanje. Obično, this i that se ne koriste na ovaj način, a reči room i table stvaraju zbunjenost.

answers.answer: That are the wires we need.
answers.feedback: Wires je množina, stoga ispravan oblik bi trebalo da bude these are, a ne that are.

answers.answer: This app on my phone, and that games on my computer.
answers.feedback: Sentenca nije kompletna. Osim toga, games je wingi, pa bi those games bio tačan.

description: Kada govorimo o opremi ili alatima, this na that pomaže da se vidi koji je to.
